'''Maja Fey'ja''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Majan]] [[Priest/Legends|priestess]] and [[Queen/Legends|queen]] from [[Baroonda/Legends|Baroonda]] who lived during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], she hosted [[Podracing/Legends|podraces]] in [[Baroo/Legends|Baroo]], for her subjects enjoyed them greatly.

{{Char-stub}}
